scripts.start:postgres: NODE_ENV=test REPOSITORY_TYPE=postgres DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5432 DB_USER=postgres DB_PASSWORD=postgres DB_NAME=product_service node server.js
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.test: npm run test:inmemory && npm run test:postgres
scripts.test:postgres: NODE_ENV=test npm run db:start && npm run state-server:start & npx jest --colors --testTimeout 30000 --testMatch "**/*-postgres.test.js" && npm run state-server:stop
